reviews.comment:
Es una pena que habiendo tanto habitantes nunca se pueda conseguir combustible un solo personal por turno no se puede y más en vacaciones cuando viene turismo es tanto que no quieren pagar a otro personal oh es muy poco el sueldo que dan para que solo uno trabaje

(Translated by Google)
It's a shame that with so many inhabitants, it's never possible to get fuel. Having only one person per shift is impossible, especially during holidays when tourists come in. There are so many people who don't want to pay additional staff, or perhaps the salary they offer is too low for just one person to work.

reviewReply.comment: Le pedimos disculpas por la situación

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13734748019616020928/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pOaFpXNXRaemRwZEVSbVVrZEhPRmwzY0c5SmJHYxAB

reviews.comment:
Otra vez que quiero cargar nafta y chamuyan con que la bomba no anda por el calor. 15° C hacían esa tarde

(Translated by Google)
I wanted to fill up with gas again, and they kept telling me the pump wasn't working because of the heat. It was 15°C that afternoon.

reviewReply.comment: Le pedimos disculpa por su experiencia

reviews.comment:
Si pagás con algún medio que no sea en efectivo tenés que bajarte del auto e ir a la oficina... o sea, todo leeento.

(Translated by Google)
If you pay with any means other than cash, you have to get out of the car and go to the office... in other words, everything is slow.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13734748019616020928/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT214MlRWVTBTMlJtZVhkQ1JuaFJka0pFYVRKUk5IYxAB

reviews.comment:
Posta, la peor YPF que visitamos, no anda nada:
No hay nafta de día (con lo cual, si llegaste justo, estás al horno)
De tarde noche, para cargar nafta, colas de 40 minutos.
Querés inflar las gomas: no funciona, el baño, clausurado…

Realmente de la peor y me extraña que sea del ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Seriously, this is the worst YPF station we've ever been to. It's a disaster:
There's no gas during the day (so if you arrive just in time, you're screwed).
In the late afternoon and evening, you have to wait in line for 40 minutes to get gas.
You want to inflate your tires? It doesn't work. The bathroom is closed...

It's truly the worst, and I'm surprised it's an ACA station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13734748019616020928/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21aaVNERjVRbmgxVUc1b1YwZDFOa0owUm5oelUzYxAB
